title: Benjamin Michael Flowers
extract: Benjamin Michael Flowers (born March 19, 1987) (known professionally as Benjamin Flowers) is an American lawyer who served as the 10th Solicitor General of Ohio. He is known for his work in appellate litigation and has represented several cases before the Supreme Court of the United States. Flowers has been recognized for his legal writing and has received awards including the Best Brief Award from the Ohio State Bar Association and the National Association of Attorneys General.
